results.title: GoCab deploys 100 electric vehicles in Abidjan as part of Yango’s fleet
results.description: GoCab, the mobility fintech that operates Yango's largest fleet in Côte d'Ivoire, has handed over 100 fully electric cars to drivers in Abidjan.

results.title: SEBI warns organisations over new AI 'boss scam'
results.description: SEBI, in coordination with the Indian Cyber Crime Coordination Centre, has alerted companies about the evolving tactics of cybercriminals, who use digital communication platforms to impersonate Managing Directors (MDs) or Chief Executive Officers (CEOs).

results.title: Citrix Secure Access and Endpoint Client for Windows Vulnerability Enables Privilege Escalation
results.description: Cloud Software Group has disclosed two security vulnerabilities affecting Citrix Secure Access Client for Windows and Citrix Endpoint Analysis Client for Windows, with one flaw allowing low-privileged attackers to gain full SYSTEM access on affected machines. The more severe issue, tracked as CVE-2026-53565, carries a CVSS v4.0 base score of 8.5 and stems from improper [...] The post Citrix Secure Access and Endpoint Client for Windows Vulnerability Enables Privilege Escalation appeared first on Cyber Security News .

results.title: CAFE III Norms 2027 Set to Transform India’s Auto Industry With Better Mileage and a Strong Push for Ethanol Vehicles
results.description: The Government of India is preparing to introduce a new phase of fuel efficiency regulations for passenger vehicles through the Corporate Average Fuel
